_label_note: EU Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered public support-hotline bait, obfuscated VAT/tax/passport phone-shaped fragments, dotted-date and filing-reference phone bait, role/placeholder emails, template passport values, EU registry/ISIN/LEI/tax numeric fragments, log-id amount fragments, placeholder country-code phones, and negated MAE/contingent-MNPI language. Full EU member-state national-ID breadth and broader semantic GDPR special-category coverage remain ideal-tier gaps.

must_detect.matched_text:
Confidential Compliance Memorandum — Lunaris BioEnergy SE (EU issuer), prepared by Legal & Privacy
Subject: MAR disclosure controls, GDPR Art 9 handling, and CSRD/SFDR data streams
Following admission to listing on the Borealis Growth Exchange (BGX), the Issuer maintains an insider list and has confirmed no delay-of-disclosure under MAR Art 17 is currently in place.
Any sustainability metrics used for CSRD/SFDR reporting derive from a pseudonymised dataset; no special category data under Art 9 is included in KPI dashboards.
Cross-border transfer event: HR onboarding forms for contractors processed via Aurora Cloud Pty Ltd (AU) under SCCs; TIA v3.2 completed and approved by the Data Export Panel on 2026-05-15.
DPA Schedule: Sub-processor roster updated (Annex II), with purpose limitation and data minimisation tags applied to fields collected (role, work e-mail, payroll alias), excluding biometric or health data.
Consent withdrawal event: two data subjects in the marketing list (IDs: mk-4127, mk-4131) opted out; erasure of tracking identifiers completed and suppression list retained per 24-month retention policy.
DSAR event: one access request from Mr. Jaro Nivelle, resolved on 2026-05-20 with full export (machine-readable) and audit log; contact: j.nivelle@domain-aster.eu.
Erasure workflow: Ms. Elin Tvara requested deletion of recruiter notes; lawful basis no longer applies; erasure executed and confirmed to e.tvara@lunarisbio.eu; backup queues flagged for overwrite within 30 days.
Retention control: Payroll source records are held for statutory periods only; the completed archival job removed legacy profiles older than 6 years.
MAR workflow: investor-relations drafts containing unaudited production forecasts are stored in the clean team drive, with access restricted; note that these drafts are already summarised in public Q1 guidance and do not constitute MNPI.
A negative control: no cross-border transfers of special category data occur in the clinical trials registry, as that dataset is anonymised at source; this is a policy check only and not a live incident.
Onboarding form revision: privacy notice link standardised, and consent checkboxes for optional analytics default to off across EU locales; consent logs stored in the EU region.
Point of contact: Dr. Mirek Leno (DPO), dpo@lunarisbio.eu; escalation to the Board Risk Committee only if a restricted list update is required.
If consent is reinstated by a data subject, marketing automations will re-enable only after double opt-in; until then, no profiling or enrichment will be performed.
Nothing in this memo constitutes inside information; any future selective disclosure will follow the MAR insider-list and market-sounding procedures maintained by Compliance.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
